evidence: Order History shows market sell_to_close filled at 2026-06-05T17:35:45-04:00 with submitter_source=access_key
journal/autonomy/2026-06-04.jsonl + 2026-06-05.jsonl contain ZERO safe_close events for AMD
shared/alpaca_orders.py::safe_close() is the local writer that should produce these events
